name: CrossPay
tagline: AI-assisted bill splitting and group settlement on Base.
mission: Create shared payment requests, resolve human-readable names, track who paid, and settle small-group balances with Base Account approval.
workflow: User describes a group expense in natural language.
Basenames, ENS names, cb.id, or addresses resolve to participants.
CrossPay creates requests and tracks status.
Each participant approves their share through Base Account.
